title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 367.060 - Sections 367.011 to 367.060 not to repeal or amend small loan laws
text:
367.060.  Sections 367.011 to 367.060 not to repeal or amend small loan laws. — Nothing in sections 367.011 to 367.060 contained shall be deemed to amend or repeal any of the provisions of sections 367.100 to 367.200 and 408.100 to 408.220.
(L. 1951 p. 281 § 7)
